response.justification: Strong generalist engineer with 15+ years of experience and recent exposure to AI infrastructure work at re:cinq, but significant gaps between Staff-level current role and Principal-level requirement. Most critically, lacks demonstrated expertise in building AI products or platforms—the core preference for this strategic role. Recent AI agent infrastructure work is promising but insufficient to establish the recognized AI thought leadership and track record needed for a director-level position focused on AI strategy.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering across full stack, infrastructure, and systems domains with multiple Staff-level roles
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, demonstrating hands-on familiarity with agentic workflows
Entrepreneurial track record as GISCollective founder and public thought leadership through workshops and conference talks
concerns: Staff-level title and career trajectory shows no principal, director, or strategic leadership advancement expected for role level
AI specialization is very recent (since April 2025) with no evidence of recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms
No advanced degree in AI or ML; education is generalist Computer Science—lacks depth signaling for specialized AI strategy role

key_factors.factor: Absence of demonstrated AI product leadership or recognition
15+ years generalist engineering experience with recent AI infrastructure exposure
Staff-level title and career progression vs. Principal/Director requirement
